hero_subtitle: Host cities are not equal. Plan lodging, transport, and exit timing based on venue reality—not assumptions.
trust_note: Static intel, offline-ready. Verify sources when booking.
cities_subtitle: Each host city has different matchday friction. Start with the places you're attending or considering.
security_advisory: Use official FIFA ticketing channels only. Avoid WhatsApp, Telegram, and unofficial resale markets. Screenshots are not proof of valid tickets. Do not trust unofficial shuttle or hospitality packages.
security_summary: Use official channels only and avoid informal resale.
bag_policy_fallback: Check official stadium policy before matchday. Do not assume backpacks or large bags will be permitted.
brief_subtitle: Tell us the parts of your trip that affect matchday friction.
how_getting: How are you getting to the stadium?
driving_vehicle: Will you be driving a personal or rental vehicle?
analysis_engine: Analysis Engine V4.0.0 Ready for Deployment
select_at_least_one: Select at least one city to continue.
no_brief_found: No brief found. Complete the readiness checker first.
multi_city_logistics_body: Crossing multiple time zones (CST/EST). Recommended minimum 48hr buffer between matchdays for recovery.
entry_requirements_body: Domestic flights still require valid government ID. Check passport validity for internal North American travel.
market_fraud_alert_body: High volume of phishing in Dallas/Miami sectors. Only use the official FIFA ticketing mobile applications.
select_cities_for_analysis: Select host cities in the City Friction Index to populate per-city analysis.
verify_departure_body: All friction guidance is based on publicly available information. Always verify transport, ticketing, and entry requirements through official sources before matchday.
complexity_summary_high: Multi-city routing across varied climate zones requiring significant logistics management.
complexity_summary_medium: Moderate coordination across host regions with at least one cross-city or international constraint.
complexity_summary_low: Single-city focus with domestic movement assumptions and lower cross-border friction.
checklist_airport_transport: Confirm ground transport from airport to {{city}} accommodation.
checklist_bag_policy: Review stadium bag policy (Clear bag only, max size 12"x6"x12").
checklist_visa_status: Verify visa status for US/Canada border crossing for {{city}} leg.
checklist_offline_maps: Download offline maps for {{city}} sector (Spotty cellular data).
assumption_stadium_center: Stadium ≠ City Center. Major venues are located in outlying suburbs with distinct transport networks.
assumption_transit: Transit availability. Unlike European hubs, public transit is not the primary mode for several host venues.
assumption_rideshare: Post-match rideshare. Pricing surges and wait times can exceed 3 hours in Miami and Dallas zones.
sources_intro: FanReady 2026 is built from publicly available official information. Always verify through official sources before matchday.
stadium_reality_varies_text: Some "city" venues are far outside downtown cores.
transit_assumptions_break_text: Rail-first cities differ from shuttle-first cities — plan accordingly.
heat_queues_compound_text: High heat risk changes how early you should arrive and exit.
post_match_trap_text: Surge pricing and congestion peak after the final whistle.
data_source_transport: Host city transport and shuttle pages
methodology_body: The friction index scores each host city using a weighted factor methodology across matchday transit complexity, stadium access, lodging distance, policy restrictions, local disruption risk, and traveler readiness. Higher scores indicate more planning friction and a greater need to verify details before matchday.
unofficial_tool: Unofficial tool. Not affiliated with FIFA, host cities, stadiums, or transit agencies. Always verify matchday information through official sources.
report_issue_guidance: Report an issue with this guidance
guide_placeholder: Matchday planning guide content will appear here.
home_intro: Friction-ranked planning for all 10 FIFA World Cup 2026 US host cities.
